observation.summary: Provider integration docs were reader-authored even though provider validation and real CLI observation manifests already held the executable facts.

hypothesis.summary: An integration matrix generator can render provider gate policy, matrix rows, assertions, instruction probes, and change procedure from provider validation manifests.

execution.summary: Run integrationmatrix to check generated docs and upload evidence in public CI.

evaluation.summary: The verifier rejects reader doc drift and the architecture coverage tool no longer classifies integration-matrix as manual debt.

retrospective.summary: Provider integration knowledge becomes a generated projection of provider manifests instead of a separate matrix interpretation surface.

evidence.proves: provider integration docs are generated from integration and provider validation manifests
public CI uploads integration matrix docs evidence
